nasb.text: O Lord, bless his substance, And accept the work of his hands; Shatter the loins of those who rise up against him, And those who hate him, so that they will not rise again.”

esv.text: Bless, O Lord, his substance, and accept the work of his hands; crush the loins of his adversaries, of those who hate him, that they rise not again.”

cnv.text: 耶和華啊，求你賜福他的能力， 悅納他手中的作為； 那些起來攻擊他和恨他的人，願你刺透他們的腰， 使他們不能再起來。”

ccb.text: 耶和华啊， 求你赐他们力量， 悦纳他们的工作， 击碎仇敌的腰杆， 使敌人一蹶不振。”
